title0: Master your workflow, liberate your mind
title1: The intelligent workspace where your projects, tasks, and creative ideas converge. Built for small teams.
login: Capture instantly, organize effortlessly, and delete with ease. Your productivity will thank you!

cloud.title: Cloud Sync
cloud.text: Access your projects and tasks from any device, anywhere, instantly.

management.title: Task Management
management.text: Organize, prioritize, and master your workflow with an intuitive interface.

collaborate.title: Collaboration
collaborate.text: Invite your team, assign tasks, and track real-time progress together.

public_templates.title: Community Library
public_templates.text: Jumpstart your projects using templates shared by the community.

private_templates.title: Private Templates
private_templates.text: Standardize your own processes with personal reusable workflows.

metrics.title: Smart Metrics
metrics.text: Visualize performance and project health with real-time charts.

free.a: Yes. The core features for personal project management are and will remain free.

security.a: We use strict security rules and encryption to ensure that only you can access your information. Your privacy is our priority.

mobile.q: Can I use it on my phone?
mobile.a: Absolutely. The platform is fully responsive, so you can manage your tasks from any mobile browser.

export.a: Yes. Your data belongs to you. You can export your tasks and projects in JSON or Markdown format whenever you need.

author.a: I'm a frontend developer who needed a cleaner, faster way to organize my life. This app is built by a dev, for devs and creators.

contact.title: Ready to boost your productivity?
contact.text: Designed specifically for freelancers and small teams looking for a fast, no-nonsense project manager.
